sections.who: Jane Doe, Director of Marketing at Acme Corp. First seen 2026-04-10 via Web - Organic (campaign: structured-content-101). 20 tracked touches over 87 days; journey stage: decision (decision behavior: competitor, pricing, contact_us; lead status "MQL"). Marketo score: 87.
sections.interest: Key moments: 2026-05-02 filled out "Webinar Registration - AI Content Readiness" · 2026-05-20 filled out "Whitepaper Download - Composable Content" · 2026-06-24 visited /compare/legacycms · 2026-06-28 visited /pricing · 2026-07-02 visited /pricing · 2026-07-06 filled out "Contact Sales". Recurring topics: content, pricing, readiness, structured, migrating, legacy. In their own words: "Interested in migrating 4 brand sites off LegacyCMS. Timeline: this fiscal year."
sections.whyCare: Warmer than 90% of cold pipeline: they raised their hand ("Contact Sales", 2026-07-06); 2x pricing views; actively comparing against an incumbent/competitor; 2 other people at Acme Corp also active; activity is accelerating. This account is moving — time spent here beats time spent prospecting.
doubts: Evaluating alternatives — expect a comparison conversation, not a blank slate.
sections.say: Open with their ask: acknowledge the "Contact Sales" submission and their exact words ("Interested in migrating 4 brand sites off LegacyCMS. Timeline: this fiscal year."). Connect it to what they explored (content, pricing, readiness) and promise a concrete answer on the first call, not discovery-for-discovery.
sections.channel: Email + call same day. They submitted a form 2 day(s) ago — inbound SLA rules apply: every day of delay costs conversion.
sections.next: Reply to the "Contact Sales" submission today with one concrete answer + one concrete question about their use case. Book the call in the same thread.
sections.followUp: Multi-thread: also touch Bob Smith (Web Engineer), Carol Jones (VP Digital Experience) — coordinate so the account hears one story. If no reply in 3 business days, follow up referencing a different proof point, then switch channel.
sections.accountContext: 3 active people at Acme Corp (2 ATL / 1 BTL): Jane Doe (Director of Marketing, 20 touches, last 2026-07-06); Bob Smith (Web Engineer, 7 touches, last 2026-07-05); Carol Jones (VP Digital Experience, 3 touches, last 2026-07-07). Treat this as a committee forming, not an individual browsing.

keyMoments.description: filled out "Webinar Registration - AI Content Readiness"
